title: paspalum alcalinum
intro: Paspalum alcalinum is a tropical grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae, native to Central and South America, characterized by its ability to grow in acidic and alkaline soils. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with Paspalum alcalinum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of Paspalum alcalinum, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, have been traditionally used in folk medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
